changes.comment: feat(run): auto-register a data source's own Prometheus metrics. If the source exposes an optional `getMetricsSink(): MetricsSink` (duck-typed, so the minimal DataSource interface keeps no prom-client dependency), `run()` adds it to the metrics server alongside the runner metrics — so source-provided gauges (e.g. a fallback source's `sqd_fallback_*`) appear on `/metrics` with no manual `addMetricsSink` wiring.
